The '''Scrivinir''' was the [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]], a remote [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Although opposing a strong, central governments, a loose [[Confederacy|coalition]] of trade and defense agreements in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] as the Centrality came to exist and was overseen by a position known as the Scrivinir, which meant "head writer" in [[Old High Trammic/Legends|High Trammic]].<ref name="SWG5">{{GamerCite|5|A Campaign Guide to the Centrality}}</ref>

In [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], [[Rokur Gepta]] announced himself as the '''Central Administrator''' of the Centrality, and bore the arms of the office.

{{Stub}}
